title: Match optional text with default label
prompt_goal: Implement a pure action that accepts an optional text input named label of type Optional<Text>. Use an explicit exhaustive match over label. Return the contained text when label is Some(value), and return the literal text missing when label is None.
public_forbidden: Do not use storage, network, time, randomness, filesystem, or external services.
Do not hardcode verifier cases or special-case concrete input values.
Do not print or emit observable effects.
Do not use a catch-all match case; Sophia match cases must be explicit.
